analyst_briefing: All 10 conflicts contested at week_count=1 with null indicator_medians, precluding quantitative deviation scoring; epistemic uncertainty paramount—baselines lock at week 13. Trajectory changes warranted for 6 conflicts (Russia-Ukraine, Sudan, Myanmar, Haiti, DRC from Escalating to Stable) as roster labels from initial seeding mismatch weekly_theatre_status 'stable' and absent new Tier 1 signals. US-Israel-Iran sustains Escalating on Apr 19 daily findings (I2 direct exchanges, Houthi I1 threats)—most significant deviation alert as early-warning spike in high-intensity theatre risks regional cascade via trade chokepoints. Sudan I6 escalation (hunger/displacement) second-priority under-covered signal. Habituation risk in Gaza I6 (2M+ trapped). F4/F3 flags maintained across Iran, Gaza, DRC, Sudan—no verifiable resolution; F2 Sudan persists. No baseline locks or retirements; Ethiopia Northern to watch. Cross-flags: GMM HIGH on Iran trade risks, ERM MEDIUM Sudan/Gaza displacement. Deviation-over-level: prioritize Iran episodic spike over familiar highs.
